Off Calendar Feb-22-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Matter calendared for Friday, February 23, 2007. Petitioner The State of California's Motion For Order Striking Claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Off Calendar Nov-15-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner The People of the State of California's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production and Inspection of Documents; Petitioner's First Set Of Special Interrogatories; And Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimants are ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
